title: Littler shrugs off Liverpool boos and criticises Rotterdam fans
articleTitle: Luke Littler shrugs off boos at Premier League in Liverpool: Reaction in Rotterdam the 'worst I have experienced'
description: Luke Littler says he does not regret what happened with Gian van Veen but believes they have both moved on; He says the boos in Rotterdam were the worst he has experienced; you can watch Premier League Darts live on Sky Sports every Thursday
